title: gynoxys macrophylla
intro: Gynoxys macrophylla, also known as Gynura or Velvet Leaf, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Gynoxys macrophylla include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and supporting digestive health. Gynoxys macrophylla is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
